title: Creeper Deactivator
description: Do you hate creepers? Just deactivate them!
body:
**This pack is made for the people that hate creepers. When you have this pack in your game, creepers will disappear in seconds.**


- You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M).
- Better use the datapack because the mod can have problems.
